description_long: This is a sturdy outdoor bench featuring a seat and backrest made from long, rectangular wooden planks with a natural finish. The bench is supported by two robust, black metal frames that anchor it securely to the ground, providing stability and durability. The wooden planks are smooth and evenly spaced, with the seat plank slightly wider than the backrest plank. The metal supports are rectangular in cross-section and extend vertically from the ground, connecting both the seat and backrest. The bench lacks armrests, giving it a minimalist and functional appearance suitable for public spaces. Its design is practical for parks, sidewalks, or other urban environments where durability and ease of maintenance are important.
description: A minimalist outdoor bench with smooth wooden planks for the seat and backrest, supported by sturdy black metal frames. The design is functional and durable, ideal for public urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the wooden seat and backrest, with both metal supports visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wooden planks and the depth of the metal supports.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the wooden planks and the full width of the metal supports.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile of the bench and the alignment of the seat and backrest.
attribute_leg_design: two wide rectangular black metal supports
